Subject: Re: Regarding Invited Talk on Securing AI Systems

Dear Students,

The End Semester feedback window for all courses is open from  06/04/2026 to 10/04/2026 .  All students have to submit the end - sem feedback within the specified timeline. 

Students are advised to submit their feedback for all their approved courses on time, failing which they will not be able to view their grades at the end of the semester.

Students must give feedback only to faculty whose lectures they are attending.
